name: Settings - Using Regions to group Outlets
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Regions can be used to group your Stores/Outlets, usually by physical location or area e.g. if you have several stores spread throughout Queensland, you may choose to configure Regions as: South-East QLD, Central QLD and Northern QLD."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphcFEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphcFEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid0 (39).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Create a Region"}], "data-id": "create-a-region"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a new Region:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Locations/Outlets > Regions", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a unique name into the "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " field"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Highlight the "}, {"text": "Country", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Outlets", "bold": true}, {"text": " to associate with the Region"}, {"text": "\n\n"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Hold Ctrl to select multiple Outlets."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Create", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Outlets already assigned to a region will not be displayed in the list; an Outlet can only belong to a single Region."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Edit a Region"}], "data-id": "edit-a-region"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To edit an existing Region:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Locations/Outlets > Regions", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Pencil ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon of an existing Region in the Regions table"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the fields as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Update", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/retail-article", "children": [{"text": "Outlet Settings"}]}]}]}]}]
